query:
SELECT
                message_id,
                tx_id::text::bigint AS "tx_id!: i64",
                producer_name,
                content_json,
                occurred_on,
                version as "version!"
            FROM outbox_messages
            WHERE
                producer_name = $1
                AND (
                    ($2::bigint = 0 AND message_id > $3)
                    OR (
                        $2::bigint <> 0
                        AND (
                            tx_id::text::bigint > $2::bigint
                            OR (tx_id::text::bigint = $2::bigint AND message_id > $3)
                        )
                    )
                )
            ORDER BY tx_id, message_id
            LIMIT $4
